name: Defender

data_sources.note: Nationwide Defender Annuity RILA. Buffer-style RILA offered with 1-, 3-, and 6-year terms. Issued by Nationwide Life Insurance Company / Nationwide Life and Annuity Insurance Company.

Nationwide Defender rate sheet. Annual product fee 1.10% for contracts issued before 2025-06-01; current S&P 500 cap up to 24.5% with 100% participation, 1-year term. Spec me_fee_annual updated 0.0125 -> 0.011 to match disclosed product fee.
10% and 20% buffer levels available; 6-year contract; CDSC applies to withdrawals above the free withdrawal corridor in first six years.
Nationwide Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A+ (Superior). Synthetic anchor 'A+' confirmed.

verification_notes: AM Best A+ confirmed, product fee 1.10% verified (spec updated from 1.25% to 1.10%), buffer levels 10/20 and 6-year term confirmed by carrier product page; cap rate 0.085 kept synthetic — disclosed S&P 500 cap up to 24.5% appears to be the participation-rate variant rather than the cap-rate variant on the 1-yr 10% buffer segment, requires rate-sheet PDF to fully resolve.
